name: Summer Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. Roughly chop the green onions.
2. Dice all the tomatoes.
3. Place the couscous in a large bowl and pour in 600 ml of cold water. Leave to soak for 15-20 minutes or until all the liquid has been absorbed.
4. Mix all the remaining ingredients with plenty of seasoning into the couscous.
TO PREPARE AHEAD: Complete the day before. Cover and chill. Serve at room temperature.
